parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO leads (
  email,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  company,
  phone,
  message,
  service_interest,
  budget_range,
  timeline,
  source,
  ai_qualification_score,
  ai_intent,
  ai_urgency,
  ai_budget_signal,
  ai_company_size,
  ai_technical_complexity,
  ai_pain_points,
  ai_next_action,
  ai_sentiment,
  ai_summary,
  ai_red_flags,
  ai_opportunity_size,
  raw_ai_analysis,
  sequence_type,
  status,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.firstName }}',
  '{{ $json.lastName }}',
  '{{ $json.company }}',
  NULL,
  '{{ $json.message }}',
  '{{ $json.service }}',
  '{{ $json.budget }}',
  '{{ $json.timeline }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  {{ $json.ai_qualification_score }},
  '{{ $json.ai_intent }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_urgency }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_budget_signal }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_company_size }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_technical_complexity }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_pain_points }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_next_action }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_sentiment }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_summary }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_red_flags }}',
  '{{ $json.ai_opportunity_size }}',
  '{{ $json.raw_ai_analysis }}',
  '{{ $json.sequence_type }}',
  'new',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;
